notes: 2 primary issues, putting AA at 1x fixes the first. The second issue is that my right-click brings up a Windows context menu with "Back", "Forward", "Print" and "View Source". Other than that, game appears to run okay. Mouse response is slow with V-Sync on and everything else high at 1080p.
title: theHunter Classic

notes: Runs out of the box, but the textures are not displayed correctly. The ground appears black on places where grass should be. Viewing in the distance the ground is brown, where grass should be. Tried using different tweaks (disable esync, disable d3d11, use wine d3d11, installed dxvk in pfx) but nothing works. Hope that somebody get this run game as Gold status and help out.
